author: yesbhautik
name: Standard Optimal: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + Sliding Window + Tuned Muon
blurb: Standard FineWeb training (no val-only). 9-layer MLP-3x (h=1536), STE fake-int6 QAT, mixed int6/int8 post-training quantization, sliding window eval stride=64, tuned Muon (momentum 0.99, LR 0.02, seq4096).
